creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Closing resolved with the following changes:

 * audit@ account disabled / set/reset password
 * Disable text set referring to this issue

Handover to reporter (committer, can editbugs) for any remaining re-assignments, if any (comment 3)

If there's anything bugmeister is needed for, please re-open and re-assign with additional detail.
